projects.name: Versatility Campaign (One Flavor, Four Ways)

Budget reallocated from Meta COLD. KPI: account-level MER floor ≥ 6.0x. Inaugural test of AdSmith's campaign-planning skill — first Teeccino campaign tracked end-to-end as a project (brief → creative → launch → optimize → post-mortem).

projects.name: PDP Rebuild (Replo → Native Liquid)

Goal: eliminate Replo dependency so ThemeSmith can directly maintain, update, and optimize PDPs. Scope is bound to live-page functionality only (see pdp-live-spec.md) — Replo-chunk features not present on the live page are dropped. Secondary: rebuild 3 other Replo templates (15 products total) after main template is complete.
